compatibilityPolicy.dependencyBoundary: generated project go.mod or isolated temporary test module
compatibilityPolicy.rollbackPolicy: Pin the previous generator, keep the previous generated snapshot serving, and block release promotion when generation, compile smoke, repeat diff, dependency boundary, or rollback evidence fails.

profiles.generatedOnlyDependencyPolicy: REST-only generated dependencies must stay in the generated project go.mod or an isolated temporary module.
profiles.repeatDiffPolicy: Repeated REST service generation must be deterministic after volatile paths and timestamps are normalized.
profiles.rollbackOrEscalation: Discard the REST scaffold diff and pin the previous generator when route layout, error envelope, OpenAPI metadata, or repeat generation drifts.

profiles.generatedOnlyDependencyPolicy: RPC transport and generated client dependencies must stay in generated projects unless the root module imports them directly.
profiles.repeatDiffPolicy: Repeated RPC scaffold generation must preserve descriptor, handler, validator, and option file names without unexplained diffs.
profiles.rollbackOrEscalation: Pin the previous RPC generator or transport profile when generated descriptors, validators, or service options stop compiling.

profiles.generatedOnlyDependencyPolicy: Model-layer database or cache dependencies belong to generated project modules and must not be added to gofly root go.mod.
profiles.repeatDiffPolicy: Repeated model scaffold generation must classify additive fields as compatible-addition and keep root dependency policy clean.
profiles.rollbackOrEscalation: Keep the previous generated model profile when database/cache dependencies, field names, or compatibility shims drift.

profiles.generatedOnlyDependencyPolicy: Production service integration dependencies must either stay in generated project modules or be reviewed through dependency ownership evidence.
profiles.repeatDiffPolicy: Future production scaffolds may report compatible additions, but deleted contracts or changed public generated names are breaking-candidate diffs.
profiles.rollbackOrEscalation: Disable future production profiles and keep current generated snapshots when compile smoke, dependency boundary, or diff classification fails.

crossCuttingChecks.rollbackOrEscalation: Pin the previous generator when include ordering, Go package aliases, plugin aliases, or generated public names collide.
Remove generated-only dependencies from the root module and keep them in generated project go.mod when ownership evidence fails.
Discard generated output when repeated generation produces unclassified diffs or misses rollback notes.

profileMatrix.rollbackOrEscalation: Keep the v0.1 generated snapshot and previous generator pinned until additive compatibility shims compile and repeat generation is clean.
Discard the regeneration output and keep the current generated project when repeat generation or compile smoke produces any unexplained diff.
Keep future fixtures as preview-only evidence and pin current generation if experimental fields stop being safely ignored.

edgeCases.rollbackOrEscalation: Fallback to the default gofly-ai profile when gozero-compatible layered files drift.
Keep default generated routes under internal/routes and keep gozero-compatible handler routes separate when layout evidence drifts.
Reject scaffold promotion when api import, api route, or api diff semantics change without migration notes.
Pin the previous generated API fixture and reject importer promotion when .api import handling changes route, field, or diff semantics.
Pin native protoc or the previous generated proto snapshot when imported proto types, package names, or generated service descriptors drift.
Pin the previous generator when include ordering, plugin aliases, Go package aliases, or generated symbol names collide after regeneration.
Discard root module dependency drift, remove generated-only dependencies from the root module, and keep them inside the generated project go.mod or isolated temporary module.
Discard generated output and keep the last known-good snapshot when repeat generation introduces unclassified diffs or missing rollback notes.

adopterActions.expectedEvidence: gofly.generated_version_compat_report.v1 with generated file counts, clean repeat-generation diff, and go test status for old, current, and future profiles
adopterActions.rollbackOrEscalation: Pin the previous generator and discard temporary generated output when the report status is not passed.

adopterActions.expectedEvidence: diffReportContract categories, adopterUpgradeProof paths, migration fidelity rows, dependency policy, and rollback notes remain aligned
adopterActions.rollbackOrEscalation: Treat unclassified generated diffs as breaking candidates until the diff is classified or the generator change is reverted.

adopterActions.expectedEvidence: gozero-compatible profile, goctl-style flags, API tooling, generated version fixtures, upgrade diff contract, and route layout boundaries remain implemented
adopterActions.rollbackOrEscalation: Keep goctl-compatible inputs accepted and warn on no-op behavior instead of changing command semantics.

adopterActions.expectedEvidence: API imports, proto imports, alias collisions, generated-only dependency boundaries, repeat-generation diffs, and rollback notes remain classified before adopter promotion
adopterActions.rollbackOrEscalation: Pin the previous generator and keep the previous generated snapshot whenever importer edge cases or repeat-generation diff classification fails.
